staticText: Deterministic browser-local shipping cost and chargeable weight planner in English, French and Swahili. Actual total weight equals package count times actual kilograms per package. Volumetric total weight equals package count times length times width times height divided by a divisor explicitly confirmed by the user. Chargeable weight is the greater total. Freight equals chargeable weight times the user-entered rate per kilogram. Fuel equals freight times the user-entered fuel percentage. Insurance equals declared value times the user-entered insurance percentage. Subtotal adds freight, fuel, insurance, fixed or local fees and packaging. Contingency equals subtotal times the user-entered contingency percentage, and the planning total adds contingency to subtotal. The tool supplies no carrier rate, route, coverage, transit time, currency conversion, customs duty, VAT, HS classification, broker fee, provider ranking, affiliate recommendation or booking quote. Inputs remain in the current browser session only and are never persisted, sent, placed in URLs or recorded in analytics. Exports are local and disabled until a valid current result exists.
